title: Vanilla Renewed
description: Vanilla Renewed enhances Minecraft with realistic effects, immersive first-person view, and quality-of-life features like right-click harvesting and trade cycling. It keeps the classic Vanilla feel, but smoother, smarter, and more polished.
body:
# ✨ Ultimate Visual & Immersion Modpack ✨

Elevate your Minecraft experience with stunning visuals, immersive sounds, and smooth gameplay. This modpack brings the world to life with detailed particles, realistic effects, and enhanced performance.

## Features

- **Visuals & Effects:** Realistic particles, subtle animations, and dynamic environmental effects make every block and item feel alive.  
- **Immersive Sound:** Step on different surfaces, hear distant thunderstorms, and enjoy a richer, atmospheric world.  
- **Gameplay Enhancements:** Convenient inventory tools, in-game information overlays, and smooth controls streamline your experience.  
- **Performance Optimized:** Sodium, Iris, and Malilib ensure stable framerates even in detailed worlds.  
- **Extras & Comfort:** Freecam, zoom, and HUD improvements let you explore and interact in style.

Step into Minecraft like never before – more alive, more beautiful, more immersive.
